section.heading: Form of certifications regarding the safety or reliability of the nuclear weapons stockpile

content.p: Any certification submitted to the President by the Secretary of Defense or the Secretary of Energy regarding confidence in the safety or reliability of a nuclear weapon type in the United States nuclear weapons stockpile shall be submitted in classified form only.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 119–60, div. C, title XXXI, § 3111(a), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 1356.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 2526 of Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1).
